alerts.title: Modular data center builder Armada raises $230 million, to build Arizona factory with new investor Johnson Controls
alerts.description: Modular data center builder Armada has raised $230 million from investors at a valuation of $2 billion, with BlackRock becoming a new investor.

alerts.title: With Gemini 3.5 Flash, Google bets its next AI wave on agents, not chatbots
alerts.description: Google launched Gemini 3.5 Flash, its most powerful coding and agentic AI model yet, at the company's annual developer conference. It is capable of autonomously executing complex tasks and building software from scratch.

alerts.title: Rivian Spinoff Raises $400M for Industrial Robots
alerts.description: The vendor will use the funds to scale deployment of Mind’s AI-powered robots in live manufacturing environments.

alerts.title: Scout AI Raises $100M to Build ‘AI Brain' for Autonomous Warfare
alerts.description: The fund raise comes as the White House pushes AI dominance across industries, including defense.

alerts.title: Polymarket launches private company trading so investors can speculate on Anthropic, OpenAI
alerts.description: The company is launching prediction markets tied to private company milestones, including valuations, IPO timing and secondary-market activity for names like OpenAI and Anthropic.

alerts.title: Google says Gemini 3.5 Flash can slash enterprise AI costs by more than $1 billion a year
